<!--
GitHub auto-injects this template into the PR body when you open a new PR
via `gh pr create` (without `--body`) or via the web "New PR" button.
Replace the comments with your content; keep the section headings intact.

The pr-form-check workflow asserts that this PR body contains:
  - an issue link / story id / track tag (e.g. #42, , Track A)
  - a `## Definition of Done` section
  - a `## Out of scope` section
The pre-push hook also blocks pushing if the body is empty.
See docs/runbooks/pr-body-quality.md.
-->

## What

<!-- 1–2 sentences. What this PR does and why. -->

## Story / Track

<!-- One of: Closes #NN | Part of STORY-NNN | Track <A-E> | Substrate. -->

## Definition of Done

<!-- Mirror the per-issue DoD. Tick items as you complete them. -->

- [ ]

## Out of scope

<!-- What this PR explicitly does NOT include. Per task-sizing.md, prefer
several small bundled-yet-visible PRs over one big one. -->

-

## Skills used

<!-- List any skills the specialist invoked. Currently expected: "None." -->

- None

## Friction log
